draft.executive_summary: While your organization has not publicly announced specific priorities, we understand the importance of cost efficiency, robust security, and a unified CAx-PLM environment on the cloud. Drawing on our experience in large-scale cloud migration and IT transformation, we propose a balanced mid-range CAx & PLM Cloud solution. This approach ensures lowered operational costs, improved design-to-deployment cycles, and stringent governance within a single platform. By anchoring on our proprietary CAx-PLM accelerator, we deliver an end-to-end solution that integrates simulation, design, and lifecycle analytics seamlessly, positioning you for accelerated innovation. Our proven methods and track record underscore our readiness to expedite your journey securely.

sections.content: While your organization has not publicly announced specific priorities, we understand the importance of cost efficiency, robust security, and a unified CAx-PLM environment on the cloud. Drawing on our experience in large-scale cloud migration and IT transformation, we propose a balanced mid-range CAx & PLM Cloud solution. This approach ensures lowered operational costs, improved design-to-deployment cycles, and stringent governance within a single platform. By anchoring on our proprietary CAx-PLM accelerator, we deliver an end-to-end solution that integrates simulation, design, and lifecycle analytics seamlessly, positioning you for accelerated innovation. Our proven methods and track record underscore our readiness to expedite your journey securely.

Organizations like yours seek to modernize legacy design and lifecycle processes while maintaining strict cost controls. Because no official priorities are publicly noted, we infer your key challenges include reconciling diverse CAD/PLM tools and ensuring seamless collaboration across functions. Addressing these needs requires a resilient cloud framework that balances flexibility, security, and speed.

Our Balanced Mid-Range CAx & PLM Cloud solution combines a moderately sized environment, high-availability databases, and integrated CAx tools with PLM lifecycle analytics. This design meets your operational expectations by offering rapid provisioning, flexible scaling, and foundational security controls. Our proprietary CAx-PLM accelerator merges simulation, design, and analytics in a single platform, uniquely designed to speed up implementation while reducing costs. By employing a hybrid support model with partial automation, we minimize downtime and streamline collaboration across distributed teams. This holistic solution will be delivered in 12 months for an estimated total cost of $2,277,000.

We will adopt a phased methodology tailored to your organization’s environment. First, we launch the Accelerated Discovery phase, assessing application dependencies and defining the cloud architecture. Next, during the Enablement phase, we migrate CAx workflows and incorporate PLM analytics, ensuring minimal interruptions. Subsequently, we implement our security and governance framework alongside limited automation for daily operations. Throughout each stage, our rapid mobilization experience expedites the process without compromising quality. We wrap up with a thorough stabilization phase, validating system performance and user adoption. This structured and proven approach equips you to achieve reliable, cost-efficient results on time.

HCLTech’s cloud transformation team brings extensive expertise in CAx tool integration and PLM modernization, having completed over 25 large-scale migrations worldwide. Our lead solution architects are certified in key cloud platforms, ensuring reliable design and implementation. Additionally, our security specialists have deep knowledge of ISO, NIST, and industry compliance standards. By combining cross-functional capabilities with a track record of successful deliveries, we stand ready to fulfill your requirements, ensuring a rapid, seamless transition that aligns with your strategic objectives.

HCLTech stands apart through our proven record of delivering cloud migrations on time and within budget. Our holistic approach offers cost-effective solutions tailored to your needs, backed by robust governance and security expertise. Leveraging our proprietary CAx-PLM accelerator ensures quicker deployment and streamlined processes. With a focus on rapid mobilization, we enable faster returns on investment and reduced operational risks, positioning you to thrive in an evolving competitive landscape.
